model_info.name: qwen2-1.5b-attn-adjust_rs
model_info.note: adjust_rs steering config for Qwen2-1.5B. The vector at vector_path is a fixed random fp32 unit direction (seed 0) with avg_proj=50 — it does NOT correspond to any behavioural direction. Used to exercise the adjust_rs (in-kernel projection) steering path under FULL CUDA graphs. Not for actual steering experiments.
